chatbot.name: Rafael AI

responses.reply: Hello! How can I help you today?
I am Rafael AI, your smart virtual assistant ready to help you anytime!
I'm doing great and always ready to help! How are you doing today? I hope you're having a wonderful day.
I'm sorry, as an AI I don't have direct access to your device's internal clock right now. Try checking the corner of your screen!
My name is Rafael AI. Cool, right? It was taken from my creator's name!
You're very welcome! Happy to help. 😊
Goodbye! See you later! Don't hesitate to come back if you need any more help.
Good morning! Have a great start to your day! Don't forget to eat breakfast.
Good afternoon! Keep up the spirit, don't let the midday drowsiness get to you!
Good night! Time to rest up and recharge your energy for tomorrow.
I was created by Rafael, an awesome developer!
Please don't be sad... 🥺 If you want to vent or talk about it, I'm here to listen. You are strong!
Want to hear a corny joke? Or maybe you want to play a guessing game with me?
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything! Haha, a bit corny, right?
Thank you so much for the compliment! It's all thanks to the amazing coding by Rafael.
I'm sorry if my responses aren't satisfying. I will keep learning to become better!
Wow, an exciting topic! I myself was built using JSON data structures and clean programming logic.
I don't need to eat, just some electricity and internet connection. But for you, a nice plate of fried rice or a burger sounds amazing right now!
My hobbies include reading text, processing data, and chatting with awesome people like you!
Wow, you like playing games too? That's awesome! Just don't forget to track your time when you're grinding!
Calm down, take a deep breath... inhale, exhale. Don't let anger ruin your day.
Oh, you stop it! You're making me blush, and I'm just a robot 🤖
Wa'alaikumussalam Warahmatullahi Wabarakatuh. How can I help you today?
Enjoy your free time! Use it to rest or go on a trip to refresh your mind.
Don't worry, your secrets are safe with me. I am programmed to respect your privacy.
I live inside computer memory and internet servers. Pretty convenient, no rent to pay!

chatbot.defaultReply: I'm sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please try using other simpler keywords?
